scenario.context: Station 03 of the day run: design the software product and place it in the architecture.
scenario.mission: You develop a viable UI concept with an architectural perspective and justified design decisions.

constraints: Separate UI and business logic cleanly

customerRequest.subject: Station 03: Product design
customerRequest.body: Please create a UI design in the context of the overall architecture.

questions.title: Create the architectural connection
questions.prompt: Which points are important for placing the UI in the architecture? (Multiple choice)

options.text: Describe interfaces between the UI and the business logic
Sketch the data flow between components
Look at the architecture only after go-live

feedback.correct: Correct: The architectural connection is established on a solid basis.
feedback.wrong: Partly wrong: Please secure interfaces and layer responsibility more clearly.

questions.title: Use a design pattern sensibly
questions.prompt: When does using a design pattern make sense?

options.text: Only when it appeared in a tutorial
When it simplifies the concrete problem and stays understandable

feedback.correct: Correct: Patterns have to serve the problem.
feedback.wrong: Not suitable: Choosing a pattern needs a clear problem reference.

questions.title: Secure the design decision
questions.prompt: Put the flow for a robust design decision in order.
items: Clarify the user and process goal
Review the decision with the team
correctOrder: Clarify the user and process goal
Review the decision with the team

feedback.correct: Correct: The decision path is traceable.
feedback.wrong: Not ideal: Please go through the goal and architectural impact before documentation and review.

questions.title: Design review time
questions.prompt: Four design variants are discussed for 18 minutes each, plus a 22-minute closing round. How many minutes in total?

feedback.wrong: Please add the variant times and the closing round correctly.

questions.title: Justify the architecture decision briefly
questions.prompt: Describe in 4-6 sentences why the chosen UI architecture is maintainable.
questions.expectedOutline: Justification of maintainability through layering and clear interfaces.

feedback.correct: Correct: The justification is technically coherent.
feedback.wrong: Please develop the layer and interface references more clearly.
